lyrics.text: Hello, it's me
lyrics.translation: 你好 是我

lyrics.text: I was wondering if after all these years you'd like to meet
lyrics.translation: 我犹豫着要不要给你来电 不确定多年后你是否还愿相见

lyrics.text: To go over everything
lyrics.translation: 愿意闲聊寒暄 细数从前

lyrics.text: They say that time's supposed to heal ya but I ain't done much healing
lyrics.translation: 人们都说时间能治愈一切 但我却似乎没有更好一点

lyrics.text: Hello, can you hear me
lyrics.translation: 嘿 你在听吗

lyrics.text: I'm in California dreaming about who we used to be
lyrics.translation: 我在加州梦见我们过去的种种美好

lyrics.text: When we were younger and free
lyrics.translation: 当时那年轻而向往自由的我们

lyrics.text: I've forgotten how it felt before the world fell at our feet
lyrics.translation: 我都快要忘了 但现实却让一切重现眼前

lyrics.text: There's such a difference between us
lyrics.translation: 我们之间的差距愈见明显

lyrics.text: And a million miles
lyrics.translation: 有如天差地别

lyrics.text: Hello from the other side
lyrics.translation: 我还是想打给你 即使相隔天边

lyrics.text: I must've called a thousand times to tell you
lyrics.translation: 即使打上千遍万遍我也想给你来电

lyrics.text: I'm sorry, for everything that I've done
lyrics.translation: 对我从前所有的一切说声抱歉

lyrics.text: But when I call you never seem to be home
lyrics.translation: 但我每次来电 似乎都是忙音不断没人接

lyrics.text: Hello from the outside
lyrics.translation: 但这相隔千里的来电

lyrics.text: At least I can say that I've tried to tell you
lyrics.translation: 至少能让我不留遗憾地告诉你

lyrics.text: I'm sorry, for breaking your heart
lyrics.translation: 抱歉我曾让你心碎成片

lyrics.text: But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore
lyrics.translation: 但值得庆幸 不会再有人让你悲痛欲绝

lyrics.text: Hello, how are you
lyrics.translation: 嗨 你最近还好吗

lyrics.text: It's so typical of me to talk about myself
lyrics.translation: 我已经习惯了自说自话帮你回答

lyrics.text: I'm sorry, I hope that you're well
lyrics.translation: 也希望你现在能好过一点

lyrics.text: Did you ever make it out of that town
lyrics.translation: 不知你是否已忘记那小城

lyrics.text: Where nothing ever happened
lyrics.translation: 那不再有故事发生的小城

lyrics.text: It's no secret
lyrics.translation: 毫无悬念

lyrics.text: That the both of us are running out of time
lyrics.translation: 我们都荒废了从前的那些时间

lyrics.text: So hello from the other side
lyrics.translation: 所以这来自远方的我的来电

lyrics.text: I must've called a thousand times to tell you
lyrics.translation: 即使打上千遍万遍我也想对你说

lyrics.text: I'm sorry,
lyrics.translation: 对我从前

lyrics.text: for everything that I've done
lyrics.translation: 所有的一切说声抱歉

lyrics.text: But when I call you never seem to be home
lyrics.translation: 但我每次来电 似乎都是忙音不断没人接

lyrics.text: But it don't matter
lyrics.translation: 但值得庆幸

lyrics.text: it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore
lyrics.translation: 不会再有人让你悲痛欲绝

lyrics.text: anymore
lyrics.translation: 也不会再有

lyrics.text: anymore
lyrics.translation: 不会再有

lyrics.translation: 不会再有

lyrics.translation: 我们的从前
